/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/app/api_server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/app/config_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/app/database.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/app/logger_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/app/models.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/session_pipeline/audio_capture.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/session_pipeline/person_detection.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/session_pipeline/recorder_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/session_pipeline/run_session_pipeline.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/session_pipeline/session.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/session_pipeline/session_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/session_pipeline/transcriber.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/edge-gateway-backend.dir/src/session_pipeline/uploader.cpp.o" -o edge-gateway-backend  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
